title: Comments — Threaded
description: Polymorphic-target threaded comments. Consumer picks `TargetRef = { kind, id, subId? }` (e.g. page+block, blog+slug, task+id). Renderless <CommentsThread> + <CommentsAnchor> wrappers; useComments(bindings, opts) hook returns items + openCount + CRUD + forbiddenWords guard. Adapter pattern — see contract-negotiations-2026-05-15 §1.
